spec_match.rationale: Beautiful interactive visualizer mapping auto, hint, and manual layers perfectly, highlighting Chrome 150 rules.

interactive.rationale: Incredibly interactive: lets the user toggle 5 distinct popover types, updates a real-time stack layers list, and displays rules annotations.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent layer inspector description.

edge_cases.rationale: Uses safe hardcoded dictionary arrays to update visual layers via innerHTML, precluding XSS injection vectors.

references.rationale: The see also block lists other concepts but completely omits the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Perfect formatting leveraging precise colorized cards, outline frames, and nice numbers.

openQuestions.title: Link ChromeStatus in see also references
openQuestions.detail: Add the official ChromeStatus link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6282804208992256 to the see also list at the bottom of the page.
